report.summary: Audited 18 recently-modified pages for UX issues; fixed BackToTop on 5 pages, added mobile table scroll on 1 page, restored Breadcrumb navigation on 1 page, created 2 OG images, and corrected 2 OG metadata references.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to 5 learn pages missing it: bitcoin-supply-shock-guide-2026, ethereum-blob-space-economics-guide, crypto-risk-management-guide-2026, solana-token-extensions-guide-2026, defi-points-airdrop-farming-guide-2026
Added mobile-friendly overflowX:auto table wrapper to solana-token-extensions-guide-2026 comparison table (2 other flagged pages already had overflow wrappers)
Added Breadcrumb navigation component to solana-token-extensions-guide-2026 (was the only recent page missing it)
Fixed OG image metadata URL on crypto-risk-management-guide-2026 (was pointing to non-existent .png, now points to new .svg)
Fixed OG image metadata URLs on ai-agent-wallets-autonomous-payments-guide-2026 (updated to include -2026 suffix matching actual file)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-risk-management-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with risk framework shield visualization, position sizing stats cards, and risk level indicators
OG image: ai-agent-wallets-autonomous-payments-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with AI agent workflow diagram, market stats cards, and purple-cyan gradient title

sections.title: Audit Summary
items: Audited 18 recently-modified learn pages and 2 ecosystem pages for UX completeness
All 18 learn pages now have: Breadcrumb navigation, BackToTop button, FAQ sections, and proper table mobile scroll
Both ecosystem pages (Initia, Maple Finance) passed audit — proper breadcrumbs, responsive grids, stats cards, and OG images present
NFTFi guide passed full audit with all UX components in place
